task: Fix EventStore implementation in src/event-store.mjs so every existing test passes

testsPassed: append validates event shape and deduplicates by eventId
listAfter is chronological, exclusive, and bounded
snapshot is immutable and does not expose stored payload references

notes: append: validates eventId (non-empty string) and occurredAt (parseable date), deduplicates by eventId via a Set, returns { inserted: false } on duplicate, deep-clones payload on store.

listAfter: sorts by occurredAt chronologically, treats cursor as exclusive (start = idx + 1), throws if cursor is unknown, requires positive-integer limit (throws on non-positive or non-integer), caps limit at 1000, returns deep-cloned events.
snapshot: returns deep-cloned events so callers cannot mutate internal state through the snapshot.
